qualifications.name: Diploma in Building Technology
notes: Source: 2026 Undergraduate Information Brochure & Admission Requirements.

one_of.subject: English Home Language
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: English Home Language or First Additional Language: Level 4, 50-59% or better.

one_of.subject: English First Additional Language
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: English Home Language or First Additional Language: Level 4, 50-59% or better.

one_of.subject: Mathematics
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics: Level 4, 50-59% OR Technical Mathematics: Level 5, 60-69%.

one_of.subject: Technical Mathematics
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics: Level 4, 50-59% OR Technical Mathematics: Level 5, 60-69%.

one_of.subject: Physical Sciences
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Physical Science: Level 3, 40-49% OR Technical Science: Level 4, 50-59%.

one_of.subject: Technical Sciences
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Physical Science: Level 3, 40-49% OR Technical Science: Level 4, 50-59%.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Building Technology (Extended Curriculum Programme)
notes: Source: 2026 Undergraduate Information Brochure & Admission Requirements.

subject_requirements.label: As for mainstream, with provision that applicants with an NSC achievement rating of Level 3 in one of the required subjects may be considered
The one lower subject may be Mathematics or Technical Mathematics, Physical Science or Technical Science, or English Home Language or First Additional Language
